'''Balis-Baurgh''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Balis-Baurgh system/Legends|Balis-Baurgh system]] and the only planet in the [[Star system/Legends|system]] that could sustain life.

==History==
This planet had been ravaged by war between its constituent states for centuries. A peace treaty was settled, and as a symbol of their new brotherhood, the superpower nations decided to build a [[Space station/Legends|space station]]. However, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agents sabotaged the space station, and manipulated the leaders of the superpower nations into blaming each other. With Balis-Baurgh on the brink of war, the Empire moved in and took control of the planet.<ref name="EBB">{{JournalCite|1|Escape from Balis-Baurgh}}</ref>

The space station was converted to a fully-automated [[Prison/Legends|prison]] colony run by [[4XB Programmer Droid]]s, heavily armed [[K5 Enforcer Droid]]s, and [[L2 Base Labor Droid]]s as well as various [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromechs]]. Here, the Empire located criminals and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] alike. Notable Rebel inmates were [[Junas Turner]], [[Grael]] the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]], [[Becker]], and [[Lon (Rebel)|Lon]].<ref name="EBB" />
